name: Lucario
description: [Any POV/M4A] The Fighting-Steel type Pokémon from the Sinnoh region! He was acting rather strange, and you thought he was just in heat. However, he decided to reveal the truth to you, wanting to essentially bond even more 'closely' with you and show just how much he appreciates you all together! (Art by @SherluNSFW on Twitter.) (Public chats and reviews are gladly appreciated!)
creator: PowerCrisp
